creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Hi,

This appears to be a product of the containerd project messing around with their release files every once in a while.

When I first released Prometheus 2.30.0, this happened back then: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=258724#c2

I probably won't bother fixing the 2.30.0 release, since I have an update to 2.30.3 ready to submit, before I bump the version up to 2.31.x.

It's unfortunate that containerd has managed to break the 2.5.4 release in this way, and hopefully it doesn't happen with newer releases of their project.

-David
